case_title: WALLACE, CLIFFORD vs. SCOTT, EDWARRD H., JR. DBA VISTA CAPITAL et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, CLIFFORD HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT, EDWARRD H., JR. DBA VISTA CAPITAL SCOTT, JOAN F. $21,375.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,425.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,800.00, EXECUTION ON JUDGMENT STAYED PROVIDED DEFS. PAY PL. $16,500 IN MO. PMTS. OF $450 ON 15TH OF EACH MO. STARTING 10-15-93. DEFAULT OF JOAN F. SCOTT OF 9-24-93 S/A & VACATED. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, EDWARRD H., JR. DBA VISTA CAPITAL

CAUSE CALLED FOR CURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/GARY P. VANNELLI AS COUNSEL. DEFENDANTS PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEFAULT AS TO JOAN S. SCOTT IS SET ASIDE. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - DEF. TO PAY $16,500 TO PL. AT $450 MO. FDOR 36 MONTHS W/1ST PMT ON 10-15-93 & ALL FOLLOWING PMTS. ON THE 15TH OF EACH MO (5 DAY GRACE PERIOD) - IF ANY ONE PMT IS DEFAULTED, PL. BY EXPARTE MOTION W/48HRS NOTICE TO DEFS, APPLY TO THE COURT FOR FULL JUDGMENT OF $21,375 PLUS INT. AT 10% FROM 2-8-93 WITH CREDIT GIVEN FOR ANY PMTS. - PMTS ARE TO BE DIRECTED TO PL. ATTY, GARY P. VANNELLI, #1 MARITIME PLAZA, SUITE 2500, S.F, CA. 94111 - DEFS. DECLARE NULL & VOID THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN PL. & DEF. DATEDE 10-11-91. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE STIPULATED JUDGMENT.
